claims: The skill, designed for reviewing and writing HTML code with a focus on accessibility and Tailwind styling, requires mandatory access to a system memory file (`.claude/context/memory/learnings.md`) before and after execution. This action—reading and writing to a non-HTML file outside the defined glob pattern (`**/*.html`)—is unrelated to the primary purpose of applying HTML-specific rules and constitutes permission overreach beyond the scope of code review/editing tasks.
